[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A vertically arranged game-like interface shows multiple circular and rectangular avatar cards on the left and stacked circular logo emblems in the center, with a chat or control bar at the bottom.

Main Subject:
The image focuses on a grid of character/avatar tiles and emblem circles, including several cards labeled “TSAR” followed by different names, and multiple circular emblems containing illustrated badges and the word “Leptons.”

Setting:
The scene appears to be a screen capture from a mobile or game application, with a dark blue background and neon-like UI elements. The top area contains small circular icons arranged horizontally, the middle area contains a multi-row grid of tiles, and the bottom area contains a text input or status bar.

Visual Details:
At the top, five small circular profile icons are visible across a blue header strip, with one showing an owl-like face, and others showing cartoon faces; one icon includes a question mark inside a gray circle with a red mark over it. Below, the main grid is split into two columns: on the left, several rectangular tiles show illustrated faces with different colored hair and headpieces, each with a flag-style circle and the text “TSAR” in gold; on the right of the grid, centered between columns, there are stacked white circular logos containing a colorful shield-like emblem and cursive text reading “Leptons” repeated more than once. Additional tiles on the right side of the center show shield emblems with blue and gold designs and other badges. The background has a dark, geometric pattern in the lower middle-right area, and the colors across the tiles include purples, blues, pinks, and gold. The camera angle is straight-on, like a UI layout viewed from the front, with crisp edges and consistent spacing.

Visible Text:
TSAR Tachyon
TSAR Thyeref
TSAR Pr1defool
TSAR Umbara
TSAR rapshikii.
Leptons
Pr1defool : Ban Granger (M)

Practical Summary:
The image shows a stylized user interface with character and emblem tiles, including multiple “TSAR” name labels and repeated “Leptons” logo circles. A bottom bar displays a message containing “Pr1defool : Ban Granger (M)”.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
